member.name: T:Mockly.HttpMockAssertionExtensions
member.summary: FluentAssertions extensions for HttpMock.

member.name: M:Mockly.HttpMockAssertionExtensions.Should(Mockly.HttpMock)
member.summary: Returns an assertion object for the HttpMock.

member.name: M:Mockly.HttpMockAssertionExtensions.Should(Mockly.RequestCollection)
member.summary: Returns an assertion object for the RequestCollection.

member.name: M:Mockly.HttpMockAssertionExtensions.Should(Mockly.CapturedRequest)
member.summary: Returns an assertion object for the CapturedRequest.

member.name: T:Mockly.HttpMockAssertions
member.summary: Assertions for HttpMock.

member.name: M:Mockly.HttpMockAssertions.#ctor(Mockly.HttpMock)
member.summary: Assertions for HttpMock.

member.name: M:Mockly.HttpMockAssertions.HaveAllRequestsCalled(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that all configured request mocks have been invoked.

member.name: T:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions
member.summary: Assertions for RequestCollection.

member.name: M:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions.NotContainUnexpectedCalls(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the request collection does not contain any unexpected requests.

member.name: M:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions.ContainRequest(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the collection contains at least one request and returns assertions for that request.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions.ContainRequestFor(System.Uri,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the collection contains a request for the given URI and returns assertions for that request.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions.ContainRequestFor(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the collection contains a request for the given URL pattern and returns assertions for that request.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions.NotContainRequestFor(System.Uri,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the collection does not contain a request matching the given URI.

member.name: M:Mockly.RequestCollectionAssertions.NotContainRequestFor(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the collection does not contain a request matching the given URL pattern.

member.name: T:Mockly.CapturedRequestAssertions
member.summary: Assertions for CapturedRequest.

member.name: M:Mockly.CapturedRequestAssertions.BeExpected(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the request was expected (matched a mock).
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.CapturedRequestAssertions.BeUnexpected(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the request was unexpected (did not match any mock).
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: T:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions
member.summary: Assertion chain for a specific captured request located from a RequestCollection.

member.name: M:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions.WithBody(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that the body of at least one of the matching requests matches a wildcard pattern.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .
member.returns: A construct that allows chaining more assertions on the matching

member.name: M:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions.WithBodyMatchingJson(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts that at least one of the matching requests has a body matching the provided JSON, ignoring whitespace/layout differences.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .
member.returns: A construct that allows chaining more assertions on the matching

member.name: M:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions.WithBodyEquivalentTo``1(``0,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Deserializes the JSON request body to a particular type and asserts it is equivalent to the expected value.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions.WithBodyHavingPropertiesOf(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Deserializes the request body as a dictionary and asserts that it contains at least the properties of the expected dictionary with matching values. Additional properties in the request body are ignored.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions.WithBodyHavingPropertiesEqualTo(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Deserializes the request body as a dictionary and asserts it is exactly equivalent to the expected dictionary, without any additional properties.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .

member.name: M:Mockly.ContainedRequestAssertions.WithBodyHavingProperty(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Asserts the body contains a top-level property with the given key and value.
member.param: A formatted phrase as is supported by explaining why the assertion is needed. If the phrase does not start with the word because, it is prepended automatically.
Zero or more objects to format using the placeholders in .
